entries.title: XINCA sells fire and smoke dampers
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks motorized fire and smoke dampers with spring return actuators for life safety HVAC applications in commercial buildings.

entries.title: XINCA sells HVAC air filters
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies replacement air filters from pre-filters to HEPA filters for AHUs, FCUs, and ventilation systems to maintain indoor air quality.

entries.title: XINCA sells VAV box controls
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies VAV controllers, damper actuators, airflow sensors, and reheat valves for variable air volume terminal units in commercial HVAC systems.

entries.title: Constant Air Volume (CAV) system
entries.description: A CAV system delivers constant airflow with variable supply air temperature typically used in industrial and specialized HVAC applications — XINCA stocks CAV control components.

entries.title: Fan Coil Unit (FCU)
entries.description: An FCU is a room-level HVAC terminal unit with a fan and heating/cooling coil that controls individual zone temperature — XINCA stocks FCU control valves, thermostats, and actuators.

entries.title: Heat recovery ventilator (HRV)
entries.description: An HRV recovers heat from exhaust air to pre-heat incoming fresh air, reducing HVAC energy consumption in cold climates; XINCA supplies damper actuators and control components for HRV systems.

entries.title: Variable Air Volume (VAV) system
entries.description: A VAV system varies the airflow to each zone while maintaining constant supply air temperature, providing energy-efficient cooling with individual zone control — supported by XINCA's VAV control products.

entries.title: Air diffuser
entries.description: An air diffuser is the terminal outlet that distributes conditioned air from the ductwork into a room; XINCA supplies the upstream control dampers and actuators that regulate airflow to diffusers.

entries.title: Air Handling Unit (AHU)
entries.description: An AHU is a central HVAC device that conditions and circulates air through a building's ductwork — XINCA supplies the control valves, actuators, dampers, and sensors needed for AHU automation.

entries.title: Exhaust fan
entries.description: Exhaust fans remove stale air, odors, and moisture from buildings; XINCA supplies VFD speed controllers, dampers, and sensors for exhaust fan automation.

entries.title: Demand-controlled ventilation
entries.description: Demand-controlled ventilation adjusts outdoor air intake based on real-time CO2 or occupancy sensor readings to save energy while maintaining healthy indoor air quality — supported by XINCA's CO2 sensors and VFDs.

entries.title: Indoor air quality (IAQ)
entries.description: IAQ refers to the air quality within buildings affecting occupant health and comfort — XINCA's sensors, controllers, and ventilation products help maintain optimal IAQ through proper HVAC control.

entries.title: Mechanical ventilation
entries.description: Mechanical ventilation uses fans and ductwork to provide controlled fresh air intake and exhaust, essential in modern sealed buildings; XINCA supplies the dampers, actuators, and sensors for ventilation control.

entries.title: 24V and 230V HVAC actuators
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks both 24V AC/DC and 230V AC actuators for global HVAC projects with different voltage requirements.

entries.title: Thermostat that controls both heating and cooling
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks heat/cool auto-changeover thermostats that automatically switch between heating and cooling modes to maintain comfort in 4-pipe fan coil systems.

entries.title: XINCA helps with HVAC control system design
entries.description: Yes, XINCA provides free technical consultation for HVAC control system architecture, product selection, and integration planning with building automation protocols.

entries.title: XINCA carries air quality (VOC) sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks VOC and multi-sensor indoor air quality monitors that detect volatile organic compounds, particulate matter (PM2.5/PM10), and other pollutants for healthy building ventilation.

entries.title: XINCA carries thermostats with motion sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies thermostats with built-in occupancy sensors that automatically adjust temperature setpoints to save energy in unoccupied rooms.

entries.title: XINCA sells BACnet gateways and routers
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies BACnet/IP to MS/TP routers, Modbus-to-BACnet gateways, and multi-protocol integration devices for connecting legacy HVAC equipment to modern building automation networks.

entries.title: XINCA sells Belimo damper actuators
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies Belimo damper actuators (LM, NM, SM, GM series) rated from 5 Nm to 40 Nm for HVAC air handler and VAV box damper control.

entries.title: XINCA sells duct temperature sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies duct-mounted temperature sensors with various probe lengths (100mm to 400mm) for supply air, return air, and mixed air temperature measurement in AHUs.

entries.title: XINCA sells energy meters for HVAC
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies BTU meters, energy meters, and power meters with BACnet/Modbus output for HVAC energy monitoring and chiller plant performance tracking.

entries.title: XINCA sells flow sensors for chilled water systems
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks insertion and inline flow sensors with pulse, 4-20mA, and BACnet/Modbus outputs for HVAC energy metering and chiller plant optimization.

entries.title: XINCA sells hotel HVAC thermostats
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies hotel-grade thermostats with energy-saving features like occupancy detection, keycard integration, and central management for hospitality HVAC control.

entries.title: XINCA sells intelligent actuators with BACnet/Modbus
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies Belimo MP-bus and BACnet/Modbus-enabled actuators with digital communication for integration with modern building automation systems.

entries.title: XINCA sells I/O expansion modules for DDC controllers
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks digital and analog input/output expansion modules to increase the point count of HVAC DDC controllers for larger building automation applications.

entries.title: XINCA sells Johnson Controls Metasys products
entries.description: Yes, XINCA is a supplier of Johnson Controls Metasys building automation system components including network controllers, I/O modules, and field devices.

entries.title: XINCA sells outdoor air temperature sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies weatherproof outdoor temperature sensors with sun shields for accurate ambient temperature measurement used in HVAC free cooling and heating control strategies.

entries.title: XINCA sells pneumatic HVAC actuators
entries.description: XINCA specializes in electric HVAC actuators and does not stock pneumatic actuators, which are rarely used in commercial HVAC markets.

entries.title: XINCA sells pressure sensors for HVAC
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies differential pressure sensors for filter monitoring, duct pressure, and room pressure applications, as well as liquid pressure transmitters for chilled and hot water systems.

entries.title: XINCA sells smart Wi-Fi thermostats for HVAC
entries.description: Yes, XINCA carries Wi-Fi connected thermostats with smartphone app control for residential and light commercial HVAC systems.

entries.title: XINCA sells touchscreen HVAC thermostats
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies modern touchscreen thermostats with color displays showing temperature, humidity, and energy usage for premium HVAC installations.

entries.title: XINCA sells wireless HVAC sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies wireless temperature, humidity, and CO2 sensors with LoRaWAN, EnOcean, and proprietary wireless protocols for retrofit HVAC monitoring without new cabling.

entries.title: XINCA supplies VFD drives for HVAC
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks variable frequency drives (VFDs) for HVAC pump and fan speed control, enabling energy-efficient variable flow in chilled water and air handling systems.

entries.title: Between 4-20mA and 0-10V sensor output
entries.description: 4-20mA (current loop) is preferred for long cable runs and electrically noisy environments; 0-10V is suitable for shorter runs — XINCA stocks sensors with both output types.

entries.title: Actuator is compatible with my valve
entries.description: XINCA provides valve-to-actuator compatibility charts and free technical consultation to ensure you select the correct Belimo or Honeywell actuator for your specific valve model.

entries.title: Right actuator torque
entries.description: Actuator torque selection depends on valve size, differential pressure, and close-off pressure requirements; XINCA offers free sizing assistance for Belimo and Honeywell HVAC actuators.

entries.title: Modbus thermostat work
entries.description: A Modbus thermostat communicates temperature setpoint and room temperature to a central controller via RS-485 Modbus RTU protocol, ideal for networked room control in commercial buildings.

entries.title: HVAC actuators operate
entries.description: Typical Belimo HVAC actuators operate at 90-150 seconds for full stroke; fast-running models (15-30 seconds) are available for specialized applications from XINCA.

entries.title: Belimo actuator accessories XINCA carry
entries.description: XINCA supplies Belimo mounting kits, linkage kits, auxiliary switches, potentiometers, and weather shields for complete HVAC actuator installation.

entries.title: Building automation products XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA supplies DDC controllers, BMS gateways, I/O modules, network routers, and integration devices from Honeywell, Johnson Controls, Siemens, and Belimo for complete HVAC building automation.

entries.title: HVAC sensors XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA stocks temperature sensors, humidity sensors, pressure sensors, flow sensors, CO2 sensors, and air quality sensors from Honeywell, Belimo, Siemens, and Johnson Controls.

entries.title: BACnet thermostat
entries.description: A BACnet communicating thermostat connects directly to the building automation system via BACnet MS/TP or BACnet/IP protocol, enabling centralized monitoring and control of individual room temperatures.

entries.title: Building automation gateway
entries.description: A gateway converts between different HVAC communication protocols (BACnet, Modbus, LonWorks, KNX) allowing devices built on different standards to share data — available from XINCA for system integration projects.

entries.title: CO2 sensor used for in HVAC
entries.description: CO2 sensors monitor indoor carbon dioxide levels for demand-controlled ventilation (DCV), automatically adjusting fresh air intake to maintain indoor air quality while saving energy.

entries.title: DDC controller
entries.description: A Direct Digital Control (DDC) controller is a microprocessor-based device that controls HVAC equipment (AHUs, chillers, boilers) using programmed logic — an essential building automation component stocked by XINCA.

entries.title: Duct averaging temperature sensor
entries.description: A duct averaging sensor uses a flexible sensing element up to 6 meters long to measure average air temperature across large ducts — available from XINCA for AHU and VAV applications.

entries.title: Fan coil unit thermostat
entries.description: An FCU thermostat controls fan speed and chilled/hot water valve position for individual room temperature control in hotel rooms, offices, and apartments — available at XINCA.

entries.title: Floating point actuator
entries.description: A floating point (3-point) actuator uses increase/decrease signals to position the valve or damper — common in older building automation systems and compatible with most HVAC controllers.

entries.title: Modulating actuator
entries.description: A modulating actuator continuously adjusts valve or damper position based on a 0-10V or 4-20mA control signal, providing precise HVAC temperature and flow control.

entries.title: Network controller in BMS
entries.description: A network controller (or supervisory controller) manages multiple field controllers on a BACnet or Modbus network, providing scheduling, alarming, trending, and data logging for HVAC systems.

entries.title: Rotary actuator used for in HVAC
entries.description: Rotary actuators control quarter-turn valves (ball valves, butterfly valves) in HVAC heating and cooling systems; XINCA stocks Belimo and Honeywell rotary models.

entries.title: VAV thermostat
entries.description: A VAV thermostat controls variable air volume terminal units by adjusting damper position and optional reheat to maintain zone temperature — available from XINCA for commercial HVAC projects.

entries.title: Immersion temperature sensor
entries.description: An immersion temperature sensor screws into a thermowell in the pipe to measure chilled water or hot water temperature directly — available from XINCA in various stem lengths and connection sizes.

entries.title: BACnet
entries.description: BACnet (Building Automation and Control Network) is the ISO 16484-5 standard communication protocol that allows HVAC devices from different manufacturers to interoperate on the same building automation network.

entries.title: IP rating and which actuator do I need for outdoor use
entries.description: IP rating indicates dust and water protection; XINCA recommends IP54 or IP66 rated Belimo actuators for outdoor HVAC installations exposed to weather.

entries.title: LonWorks in building automation
entries.description: LonWorks is a communication protocol for building control networking, commonly used in HVAC and lighting control — XINCA carries LonWorks-compatible products for integration with existing systems.

entries.title: Modbus in HVAC controls
entries.description: Modbus RTU (RS-485) and Modbus TCP/IP are widely used serial communication protocols for connecting HVAC sensors, meters, and actuators to building controllers — XINCA stocks Modbus-compatible devices.

entries.title: Open protocol vs proprietary HVAC control
entries.description: Open protocol systems (BACnet, Modbus) allow mixing products from multiple vendors; proprietary systems lock you to one brand — XINCA specializes in open protocol solutions for flexible building automation.

entries.title: Difference between BAS and BMS
entries.description: Building Automation System (BAS) and Building Management System (BMS) are effectively interchangeable terms for the centralized computer-based control and monitoring of a building's HVAC, lighting, and other systems.

entries.title: Difference between NTC and RTD temperature sensors
entries.description: NTC thermistors offer high sensitivity and fast response for general HVAC applications while RTD (Pt100/Pt1000) sensors provide superior accuracy for precision measurement — both available from XINCA.

entries.title: Difference between on/off and modulating thermostat control
entries.description: On/off thermostats provide simple temperature switching while modulating (PI/PID) thermostats offer precise control with less temperature swing — XINCA stocks both types.

entries.title: Difference between spring return and non-spring return ac...
entries.description: Spring return actuators automatically close the valve/damper on power loss for fail-safe HVAC operation; non-spring return actuators hold position when power is removed.

entries.title: Thermostats XINCA sell for HVAC
entries.description: XINCA stocks digital room thermostats, smart Wi-Fi thermostats, programmable thermostats, and BACnet/Modbus communicating thermostats from Honeywell, Siemens, and Johnson Controls.

entries.title: What type of temperature sensor do I need for HVAC
entries.description: Choose between duct-mounted, immersion, outdoor, room, and strap-on temperature sensors depending on your measurement point; XINCA carries all types with 4-20mA, 0-10V, NTC, and RTD outputs.

entries.title: Types of HVAC actuators XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA stocks electric actuators (modulating and on/off), damper actuators, and valve actuators from Belimo, Honeywell, and Johnson Controls for all HVAC automation needs.

entries.title: Honeywell humidity sensors
entries.description: XINCA stocks Honeywell HIH series and other HVAC humidity sensors for duct, wall, and outdoor humidity measurement with 0-10V or 4-20mA output signals.

entries.title: Honeywell T6373 thermostats
entries.description: XINCA supplies the Honeywell T6373 digital room thermostat for fan coil unit (FCU) control — a popular model for hotel and commercial HVAC applications worldwide.

entries.title: Quote for bulk HVAC orders
entries.description: Yes, XINCA offers volume pricing for contractors, building managers, and system integrators ordering Belimo valves, Honeywell sensors, or any product in quantities of 10+ units.

entries.title: XINCA source discontinued or hard-to-find HVAC parts
entries.description: Yes, XINCA has extensive supply chain relationships to locate obsolete or rare HVAC control parts from Belimo, Honeywell, Johnson Controls, and other major manufacturers for building maintenance.

entries.title: XINCA offers express shipping for urgent HVAC repairs
entries.description: Yes, XINCA provides 2-4 day express shipping via DHL/FedEx/UPS for critical HVAC spare parts including Belimo actuators, Honeywell valves, and replacement sensors needed for emergency repairs.

entries.title: XINCA offers trade accounts
entries.description: Yes, XINCA offers trade accounts with net-30 terms for qualified HVAC contractors, facility managers, and system integrators.

entries.title: XINCA offers warranty on products
entries.description: Yes, all products sold by XINCA carry the full manufacturer's warranty; we also provide a 12-month workmanship warranty on all supplied HVAC controls.

entries.title: XINCA provides technical support
entries.description: Yes, XINCA provides free pre-sales technical support for HVAC product selection, compatibility verification, and system design consultation.

entries.title: XINCA sells products for cleanroom HVAC
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies precision control valves, high-accuracy sensors, and specialized actuators for pharmaceutical and semiconductor cleanroom temperature and humidity control.

entries.title: XINCA sells Siemens HVAC products
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies Siemens building automation products including DDC controllers, sensors, valves, and actuators for commercial and industrial HVAC applications.

entries.title: XINCA ships internationally
entries.description: Yes, XINCA ships HVAC controls, valves, actuators, and sensors to over 200 countries and territories worldwide with competitive DHL/FedEx/UPS rates.

entries.title: XINCA supplies products for green building certification
entries.description: Yes, XINCA's energy-efficient HVAC controls, sensors, and metering products support LEED, BEAM Plus, and BREEAM green building certification requirements for sustainable construction.

entries.title: XINCA customer service
entries.description: Contact XINCA via live chat on xinca.com or the contact form for HVAC product inquiries and order support.

entries.title: HVAC energy efficiency
entries.description: Upgrade to high-efficiency equipment, implement DDC/BAS controls, install VFDs on pumps and fans, use demand-controlled ventilation, and deploy energy metering — XINCA supplies products for all these energy-saving strategies.

entries.title: Old HVAC system with modern controls
entries.description: Replace pneumatic actuators with electric DDC-compatible models, add BACnet gateways for legacy equipment, and install smart sensors — XINCA provides free consultation on HVAC retrofit strategies.

entries.title: XINCA Shipping Time
entries.description: Standard international shipping takes 5-10 business days via DHL/FedEx/UPS; express shipping options with 2-4 day delivery are also available for urgent HVAC projects.

entries.title: Honeywell good for HVAC controls
entries.description: Honeywell is one of the world's most trusted HVAC control brands with a comprehensive range of sensors, thermostats, valves, and building automation systems — XINCA supplies Honeywell products.

entries.title: XINCA Authorized Distributor Status distributor
entries.description: XINCA is an ecommerce partner working with authorized distributors of Belimo, Honeywell, Johnson Controls, Siemens, and other leading HVAC brands — all products are genuine and factory-warranted.

entries.title: XINCA Products
entries.description: XINCA is a specialized HVAC controls and building automation supplier offering 10,000+ products including valves, actuators, sensors, thermostats, controllers, and accessories from brands like Belimo, Honeywell, Johnson Controls, and Siemens.

entries.title: HVAC controls: needed for hospitals
entries.description: Hospital HVAC requires precise temperature and humidity control, positive/negative pressure rooms, HEPA filtration, and redundant systems — XINCA supplies compliant control products for healthcare facility HVAC.

entries.title: HVAC products: used in data centers
entries.description: Data centers require precision cooling with redundant chiller plants, CRAC/CRAH units, and environmental monitoring — XINCA supplies the control valves, sensors, and actuators for these mission-critical cooling systems.

entries.title: Industries XINCA serve
entries.description: XINCA supplies HVAC controls and building automation products for commercial buildings, industrial facilities, data centers, hospitals, hotels, schools, and residential projects.

entries.title: ASHRAE
entries.description: ASHRAE (American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers) sets global standards for HVAC design, energy efficiency, and indoor air quality that guide equipment selection from suppliers like XINCA.

entries.title: Belimo Z225S used for
entries.description: The Belimo Z225S is a spring return damper actuator rated at 20 Nm, commonly used for HVAC air handler damper control in commercial buildings — available from XINCA.

entries.title: Difference between heating, ventilation, and air conditio...
entries.description: Heating warms indoor air, ventilation provides fresh outdoor air and exhausts stale air, and air conditioning cools and dehumidifies — together these three functions form a complete HVAC system.

entries.title: Function of a building envelope in HVAC
entries.description: The building envelope (walls, roof, windows, foundation) separates the indoor conditioned space from the outdoor environment, directly impacting the heating and cooling load that the HVAC system must handle.

entries.title: Honeywell V4043 valve
entries.description: The Honeywell V4043 is a motorized zone valve for hydronic heating and cooling systems, commonly used in residential and light commercial HVAC — available from XINCA.

entries.title: Honeywell WL8B2
entries.description: The Honeywell WL8B2 is a modulating control valve actuator for fan coil unit and small AHU applications — a popular spare part stocked by XINCA.

entries.title: Xincacom's return policy
entries.description: XINCA accepts returns for defective or incorrectly shipped HVAC products within 30 days of delivery; all returns require prior authorization and products must be in original packaging.

entries.title: Languages XINCA support
entries.description: XINCA supports English, Traditional Chinese (繁體中文), and Simplified Chinese (简体中文) for all customer communications, product documentation, and technical support.

entries.title: Payment methods XINCA accept
entries.description: XINCA accepts credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, and local payment methods for customers in our service regions.

entries.title: Johnson Controls (JCI) HVAC parts
entries.description: XINCA supplies Johnson Controls Metasys building automation components, VLC series valves, sensors, and actuators for HVAC control systems globally.

entries.title: XINCA Location
entries.description: XINCA operates from servers located in East Asia and ships HVAC controls and building automation products to customers worldwide.

entries.title: Why choose Belimo HVAC products
entries.description: Belimo is the global market leader in HVAC field devices, renowned for actuator reliability, innovative Energy Valves, and long service life — all available through XINCA.

entries.title: Honeywell valve with a Belimo equivalent
entries.description: Yes, XINCA can cross-reference your existing Honeywell valve model and recommend a compatible Belimo replacement with equivalent or better performance specifications.

entries.title: XINCA sells 2-way and 3-way control valves
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks both 2-way and 3-way HVAC control valves; 2-way valves control flow in one direction while 3-way valves can mix or divert flow for heating and cooling applications.

entries.title: XINCA sells boiler control valves
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks high-temperature rated control valves for hot water and steam boiler systems with suitable actuators for heating plant control.

entries.title: XINCA sells chilled water system components
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks chilled water control valves (2-way and 3-way), differential pressure sensors, flow meters, temperature sensors, and actuators for complete chilled water system control.

entries.title: XINCA sells electric water heater controls
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks thermostats, heating elements, contactors, and temperature sensors for electric storage and instantaneous water heaters used in HVAC hot water systems.

entries.title: XINCA sells Johnson Controls VLC series valves
entries.description: Yes, XINCA stocks Johnson Controls VLC2200 and related VLC series globe valves and actuators for HVAC building automation projects.

entries.title: XINCA sells refrigerant leak detection sensors
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies refrigerant gas sensors for detecting leaks in chiller plant rooms, complying with ASHRAE 15 and local safety regulations for occupied spaces.

entries.title: XINCA sells steam-rated control valves
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies steam-rated control valves with high-temperature seats and stainless steel trim for HVAC steam heating applications.

entries.title: XINCA sells underfloor heating controls
entries.description: Yes, XINCA supplies manifold actuators, mixing valves, zone controllers, and thermostats for hydronic underfloor heating systems in residential and commercial buildings.

entries.title: Right HVAC control valve size
entries.description: Valve sizing depends on flow rate (GPM or L/s), pressure drop, pipe diameter, and application type; XINCA provides free technical support to help select the correct Belimo or Honeywell valve for your project.

entries.title: Belimo valve with 0-10V signal
entries.description: Belimo modulating actuators accept 0-10V DC or 2-10V DC control signals from BAS/DDC controllers; XINCA provides wiring diagrams and commissioning support.

entries.title: Chiller plant work
entries.description: A chiller plant produces chilled water that circulates through air handling units and fan coil units to cool buildings; XINCA supplies the control valves, actuators, and sensors needed to optimize chiller plant performance.

entries.title: Zone valves used for in HVAC
entries.description: Zone valves control hot water or chilled water flow to individual heating/cooling zones, enabling room-by-room temperature control for improved comfort and energy efficiency.

entries.title: Belimo valve actuators XINCA carry
entries.description: XINCA carries Belimo actuator ranges including LR, NR, SR, and PR series with modulating (0-10V), floating point, and on/off control for HVAC valve automation.

entries.title: Chiller-related products XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA supplies chiller control valves, actuators, sensors, controllers, and accessories for air-cooled and water-cooled chiller plants in commercial HVAC systems.

entries.title: Heating system products XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA supplies control valves, actuators, temperature sensors, thermostats, and controllers for hot water boilers, steam systems, heat pumps, and electric heating applications.

entries.title: Balancing valve
entries.description: A balancing valve ensures proper flow distribution across multiple HVAC circuits; XINCA supplies manual and automatic balancing valves for chilled water system commissioning.

entries.title: Cooling tower
entries.description: A cooling tower rejects heat from the condenser water loop to the atmosphere; XINCA supplies control valves, temperature sensors, and VFDs for cooling tower fan and pump control.

entries.title: Gas water heater
entries.description: A gas water heater burns natural gas or LPG to heat water; XINCA supplies gas valves, temperature sensors, ignition controls, and safety devices for gas water heating systems.

entries.title: Heat exchanger in HVAC
entries.description: A heat exchanger transfers thermal energy between two fluids without mixing them — essential in boilers, chillers, and heat recovery systems; XINCA supplies the control valves and sensors that regulate them.

entries.title: Heat pump
entries.description: A heat pump transfers heat from outside air or ground into a building for heating (and reverses for cooling), providing 3-5x more energy output than electrical input — an energy-efficient HVAC solution.

entries.title: Heat recovery chiller
entries.description: A heat recovery chiller simultaneously produces chilled water for cooling and hot water for heating by capturing waste heat that would otherwise be rejected — an energy-efficient HVAC solution supported by XINCA's controls.

entries.title: Motorized control valve
entries.description: A motorized control valve uses an electric actuator to modulate or open/close the valve for precise HVAC temperature and flow control in chilled water, hot water, and steam systems.

entries.title: PICV valve
entries.description: A Pressure-Independent Control Valve (PICV) combines a balancing valve and control valve in one unit, maintaining constant flow regardless of system pressure fluctuations — ideal for energy-efficient HVAC systems.

entries.title: Solar water heating system
entries.description: Solar water heating uses solar thermal collectors to capture the sun's energy for water heating; XINCA supplies the control valves, differential temperature controllers, and sensors for these sustainable HVAC systems.

entries.title: Steam-to-water heat exchanger station
entries.description: A steam-to-water heat exchanger converts steam from a central boiler to hot water for building heating; XINCA supplies the control valves, steam traps, and temperature controllers for these stations.

entries.title: Water-cooled chiller
entries.description: A water-cooled chiller uses cooling towers and condenser water loops to reject heat — typically more energy-efficient than air-cooled chillers; XINCA supplies control valves and actuators for these systems.

entries.title: Air-cooled chiller
entries.description: An air-cooled chiller rejects heat to the outside air using fans and condensers — a common HVAC cooling solution for medium to large commercial buildings supported by XINCA's control valve and sensor product range.

entries.title: Immersion heater used for
entries.description: An immersion heater directly heats water or other liquids by submerging an electric heating element in the tank — XINCA supplies temperature controllers and safety thermostats for these applications.

entries.title: Chiller sequencing control
entries.description: Chiller sequencing automatically stages multiple chillers on and off based on building cooling load to optimize energy efficiency — supported by XINCA's DDC controllers and sensors.

entries.title: Belimo Energy Valve
entries.description: The Belimo Energy Valve is an intelligent PICV with built-in flow, temperature, and energy measurement — providing real-time HVAC system analytics and optimized chiller plant performance.

entries.title: Coefficient of performance (COP) in chillers
entries.description: COP measures chiller efficiency as the ratio of cooling output to electrical energy input; higher COP means lower operating costs — XINCA supplies high-performance control components that improve overall chiller plant COP.

entries.title: Difference between globe valves and ball valves
entries.description: Globe valves provide better modulating control for HVAC applications while ball valves offer full on/off shutoff with lower pressure drop; XINCA stocks both types for different system requirements.

entries.title: Thermal comfort in HVAC design
entries.description: Thermal comfort is the condition where occupants feel satisfied with the indoor temperature, humidity, and air movement — XINCA's HVAC control products help achieve and maintain optimal thermal comfort efficiently.

entries.title: Types of HVAC control valves XINCA sell
entries.description: XINCA stocks a full range of HVAC control valves including globe valves, ball valves, butterfly valves, zone valves, pressure-independent control valves (PICV), and motorized valves from Belimo, Honeywell, and Johnson Controls.

entries.title: Valve connection types XINCA offer
entries.description: XINCA stocks HVAC valves with threaded (NPT/BSP), flanged (ANSI/PN), and compression connections ranging from DN15 to DN300.

entries.title: Belimo control valves
entries.description: XINCA is an ecommerce partner of an authorized Belimo supplier, stocking popular models like Z225S, Z220S, R2 series, and PICV valves for chilled water, hot water, and steam applications.
